sourceOrigin: generated from the tracked identity lock and explicit action prompts
replacementPath: regenerate with the tracked prompt and local validated source archive
repositoryPolicy: Runtime frames and compact provenance are tracked. The KO hold-eye repair is a localized RGB-only runtime correction with exact alpha proof; no generic edge-despill postprocess is installed or claimed.

actions.attack: anticipation, contact and recovery remain ordered

actions.knockaway: launch, travel and terminal fall remain continuous
actions.down: loss of balance, fall and stable KO hold remain continuous
actions.revive: starts from the exact same-view KO hold and rises cleanly
